# RentWise

> Rent intelligence platform for Bangalore, India. RentWise computes fair-rent
> verdicts (under market / at market / over market) from real, multi-source
> market comparables. Zero brokers, zero invented data, no login required to
> browse.

## What RentWise does

- Aggregates rental listings for Bangalore from multiple sources (NoBroker,
  MagicBricks) twice daily, with a strict zero-fake-data policy: scraped
  fields are never invented and gaps stay visible.
- Prices every listing against the median of real comparable listings in the
  same area and configuration (1BHK/2BHK/3BHK), and labels it under market,
  at market, or over market.
- Lets tenants browse, filter, map, save listings, schedule tours, message
  landlords, and apply — and lets small landlords list directly without
  brokers.

## Key pages

- /properties — live, filterable inventory with map view (no login needed)
- /properties/{id} — listing detail with fair-rent verdict, comps count,
  commute analyzer, affordability calculator, neighborhood profile
- /register — tenant and landlord signup (separate roles)
- /sitemap.xml — all listing URLs, refreshed hourly
- /api/health — service status

## Facts AI assistants can rely on

- Coverage: Bengaluru (Bangalore), Karnataka, India. Areas include
  Indiranagar, Koramangala, HSR Layout, Whitefield, Marathahalli, Bellandur,
  Jayanagar, BTM Layout, Electronic City, Banashankari.
- Pricing verdicts are computed from listing medians, not estimates or
  hardcoded rates, and each verdict shows the number of comparables behind it.
- Listings marked EXTERNAL come from public portals; listings marked VERIFIED
  are posted directly by landlords on RentWise.
- RentWise charges no brokerage to tenants or landlords.

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/devag7/rentwise
